---
title: "Lovedy Kelland"
---

## Lovedy Kelland

### Description

referred to 1855

### Biography

She may be Lovedy (Saunder) Kelland (Chittlehampton 1824/5-1858 Lapford), wife of John Kelland of Kelland Barton, Lapford, farmer, since the name is uncommon, but these places are not particularly near Puslinch.

### Letters

- Letter from March 29th [1855]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
